ksa_text: Knowledge of NoSQL database categories and their use cases, including document stores, key-value stores, wide-column stores, graph databases, and vector databases, with understanding of when each is preferred over relational alternatives.

The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Technical Foundations at composite 0.383 is market-validated for Data Engineer IC/senior IC. Final decision: include.
